---
name: Bug report
about: Skill produces incorrect, broken, or incomplete output
title: "bug(<skill-name>): "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Skill name:**
<!-- e.g. performance-audit-laravel-mysql -->

**Skill version:**
<!-- e.g. v1.0.0 -->

**Stack used:**
<!-- e.g. Laravel 12, MySQL 8.0, PHP 8.3 -->

**Parameters provided:**
<!-- e.g. LARAVEL_VERSION=12, SERVER_RAM=16 -->

**What happened:**
<!-- Paste the broken output or describe the failure clearly -->

**What you expected:**

**How to reproduce:**
<!-- Paste the exact prompt or the steps used to trigger the skill -->

**Claude model used:**
<!-- e.g. Claude Sonnet 4.5, Claude Opus 4 -->
